title: Vanishing & Invisibility Abilities
description: Learn how to create vanishing abilities for players, including invisibility effects, stealth mechanics, and action feedback using Java and PaperMC.

lessons.title: Introduction to Vanishing

lessons.title: Stealth Mechanics & Player Detection

quiz.question: Which method hides a player from others on the server?

lessons.title: Effects, Particles & Action Feedback

quiz.question: Which Particle type is used for a smoke trail?
Which method sends an action bar message to the player?

lessons.title: Cooldowns & Toggleable Vanish

quiz.question: How do you prevent a player from using vanish repeatedly?
